overall.description: A gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing vehicle navigation through Night City's industrial district during golden hour. The player drives through multi-level highway underpasses, stops at traffic lights at major intersections, and observes the dystopian urban landscape with massive concrete overpasses, industrial storage tanks, and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway underpass with industrial facilities

events.description: vehicle navigates a left curve around large industrial storage tanks
vehicle stops at red light at El Camino Real and Barranca intersection

agents.ego_description: driving through industrial highway underpasses, navigating a left curve around large industrial storage tanks

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in the same lane maintaining distance

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning the road with metal support beams
large cylindrical metal industrial tanks with connecting pipes and valves
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying animated pink and purple graphics
green highway directional sign with white text reading El Camino Real

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a vehicle driving under massive concrete highway overpasses in an industrial district. The camera passes a large digital billboard on the right and navigates a left curve around industrial storage tanks. The golden hour sun creates a warm backlight through the hazy atmosphere as the vehicle approaches the El Camino Real intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection under elevated highways with traffic control

events.description: cross traffic passes through the intersection from right to left while waiting at red light
traffic light changes from red to green, signaling permission to proceed

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light at the intersection, observing cross traffic moving through the intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan crossing the intersection from right to left through the crosswalk
silver car waiting at the opposite side of the intersection for the light

entered.detail: suspended horizontal traffic signal structure showing red lights
green street sign with white text reading Barranca
painted yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle is stopped at a red light at the El Camino Real and Barranca intersection beneath the elevated highway structure. Cross traffic moves through the intersection while the camera waits. The traffic light array hangs overhead, and yellow crosswalk stripes mark the asphalt. After observing several cars pass, the light changes to green.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway corridor with industrial scaffolding and metal frameworks

events.description: vehicle accelerates from stop and proceeds through the green light
approaching the next intersection with Hargreaves street signage becoming visible

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the green light and driving under the elevated highway structure toward the next intersection

entered.detail: industrial metal framework and scaffolding supporting the elevated highway above
green street sign with white text reading Hargreaves

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates through the green light and drives under the massive elevated highway structure. Industrial metal scaffolding lines the right side of the road. The camera moves forward through the corridor of concrete and steel as the Hargreaves street sign becomes visible in the distance, indicating the approach to the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection of El Camino Real and Hargreaves beneath overpasses

events.description: vehicle stops at red light at the Hargreaves intersection
traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light at the Hargreaves intersection, waiting for the signal to change

notable_agents.action: white sports car approaching the intersection from the left side

entered.detail: painted yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a red light at the Hargreaves intersection. The El Camino Real sign is now positioned to the left while the Hargreaves sign hangs directly ahead. A white sports car approaches from the left. After a brief wait, the traffic light changes to green, signaling the vehicle to proceed.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway corridor approaching Santa Anna intersection

events.description: vehicle accelerates through the green light at Hargreaves
approaching the Santa Anna intersection with new signage visible

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the green light and driving toward the Santa Anna intersection

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading Santa Anna

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates through the green light at Hargreaves and continues driving under the elevated highway structure. The Santa Anna street sign becomes visible ahead as the vehicle approaches the next intersection. The concrete overpass structure dominates the center of the frame while the El Camino Real sign shifts to the right side of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy industrial district that transitions from a fluid drive under massive overpasses to a momentary standstill at a busy urban intersection. It begins with a vehicle navigating a left curve beneath towering concrete highway structures, passing a large digital billboard and industrial storage tanks bathed in the warm backlight of the golden hour sun. As the vehicle approaches the El Camino Real intersection, the motion slows and eventually halts beneath an overhead traffic light array. The scene then shifts to a stationary perspective, observing cross traffic and yellow crosswalk stripes on the asphalt while waiting for the signal. Finally, the camera remains poised as the light changes to green, preparing to move forward into the dystopian landscape.

The shot follows a continuous forward journey through a brutalist industrial corridor that transitions from a high-speed drive to a momentary pause at a city intersection. It begins with the vehicle accelerating under a massive elevated highway, passing industrial metal scaffolding as the camera pushes toward a distant Hargreaves street sign. As the vehicle reaches the intersection, the motion halts at a red light, bringing the El Camino Real and Hargreaves signs into clear view while a white sports car glides past from the left. Once the light shifts to green, the vehicle surges forward again, moving deeper under the dominating concrete overpass. The scene finally opens up toward the Santa Anna street sign as the El Camino Real marker recedes to the right, maintaining the oppressive scale of the urban infrastructure.
